description_long: This is a classic Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a robust wooden stock and handguard paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle has a curved, detachable magazine, likely made of metal or polymer, which is characteristic of AK-pattern rifles. The top of the receiver is fitted with traditional iron sights, and the barrel extends forward with a slotted flash hider at the muzzle. The trigger guard and pistol grip are integrated into the lower receiver, with the grip also appearing to be made of wood or a wood-like material. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible rivets and mechanical details, emphasizing durability and reliability. The finish is a mix of wood grain and matte black metal, giving it a rugged, functional appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, matte black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a slotted flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and receiver, with the magazine and stock edges visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, curved magazine, and the mechanical details of the receiver.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the rifle, showing the trigger guard, magazine, and the bottom of the stock.
